Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It's like we stepped into a novel...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Yes, look at how those lights sparkle... And the decorations are so pretty![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Wow...! There are more decorations over there too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Since we're here, should we have a look around?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro and I walked around and[n]looked at the Christmas decorations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Thank you for such a memorable night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I figured today was a special day, so I made this for you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: (Item name) received.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}It was my first time making something like this, so it's not perfect, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Please, um... I hope you'll think of me when you use it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 40 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Umm... The truth is, I-I've been nervous since this morning...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 40 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Today is Christmas Eve, so... it's a special day for couples...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 40 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 3 25 25}And this is, um... the first time I'm spending Christmas with a... a boyfriend...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 40 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I'm reminded again of how lucky I am to be here right now, with the one I love...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 40 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Christmas... What a beautiful season.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shared a tender moment with Chihiro...[n]{f 1 1}
